business.name: Joe's Auto Repair
business.description: Family-owned auto repair serving the West Side for over 20 years.
business.about: At Joe's Auto Repair we keep your vehicle running safely and reliably. From routine oil changes to complex engine diagnostics, our certified technicians get the job done right the first time.

services.name: Oil Changes
services.description: Fast, full-service oil and filter changes.

services.name: Brake Repair
services.description: Pads, rotors, and full brake inspections.

services.name: Engine Diagnostics
services.description: Computerized diagnostics for the check-engine light.

reviews.author: Maria G.
reviews.text: Honest, fast, and fair pricing. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Dan P.
reviews.text: Joe explained everything clearly. Won't go anywhere else.
